name: io.github.zuohuiyang/dump-analyzer-mcp-server
title: Dump Analyzer MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol server for remote Windows crash dump analysis using WinDbg/CDB

runtimeArguments.name: --public-base-url
runtimeArguments.description: Client-reachable base URL used when returning upload_url; required for remote upload workflows

runtimeArguments.name: --upload-dir
runtimeArguments.description: Directory used for temporary uploaded dump storage

runtimeArguments.name: --max-upload-mb
runtimeArguments.description: Maximum upload size in megabytes for crash dump uploads

runtimeArguments.name: --session-ttl-seconds
runtimeArguments.description: Time-to-live in seconds for inactive upload and analysis sessions

runtimeArguments.name: --max-active-sessions
runtimeArguments.description: Maximum number of active upload sessions
